items.title: Puppet Workshop: Rod Puppets
items.description:
Join us for a beginner level puppet fabrication workshop making simple MOTHMAN rod puppets! These fun critters will have a central rod and sliding control for flapping wings. The panel will have supplies for 35 participants, and supplies will be provided on a first come first serve basis. Participants must be comfortable working with scissors and hot glue, but no other experience is required! Young children must be accompanied by a helpful adult guardian for maximum fun. Once we've finished creating our new puppets we'll start to explore some performance and character basics! 
Our flock of MOTHMEN are welcome to join the Large Parade Puppet in the Fursuit Parade! Talk to the panel runner for more information!

items.title: Furries? At My University?
items.description:
It's more likely than you think!

Do you go to university? Want to find out what starting or running a university furry club entails? Or maybe you'd like to ask for general college advice or talk and connect with furries of similar majors! If so, this is the panel for you!

items.title: Free Miniature/DND Paint & Take!
items.description:
Provided by Chronicle RPGs & Zenith's Outer Reach; Come paint with us! Whether you're a complete beginner or an established maestro, join us for a free miniature and all supplies provided. Take part for as long as you like with drop-in tables commencing from 10AM! 

Scan the QR code to preview the Zenith's Outer Reach Kickstarter, or copy the link here: https://www.backerkit.com/call_to_action/f895d526-7872-41e5-94c1-a010a6ec5898/landing?preview_mode=true

items.title: Lighting For Latex Photography
items.description: Are your rubber photos lacking shine and polish? Want to add a certain sparkle to your pics? Lighting is the key! Learn from goopy rubber dog and professional photographer Rubber Skulldog how to set up your lights and use your environment to add definition and pizazz to your pictures and videos

items.title: "Handle with Care" - Dark & Difficult Topics
items.description: Not everything in writing is sunshine and rainbows. Sometimes a story requires delving into the things we'd rather not. This panel will look at some of them, and discuss how to deal with them respectfully.

items.title: Art Fight Battlefield!
items.description: Art Fight is an annual character based art trading game that takes place every July where teams earn points by "attacking" (making art for) other users. Come armed with a device to view characters posted on the site (such as your phone) and something to do art on (sketchbook, iPad). This will operate similar to a sketchbook swap, but instead of sketchbooks we will have note cards with usernames to help you find users to "attack" (make art for). All skill levels welcome! To learn more about art fight or join the game, check out artfight.net!

items.title: Yugioh TCG
items.description: It’s time to d-d-d-d-d-duel!! Bring your strongest cards and rev it up with the super special awesome  children’s card game Yugioh!! Whether you’re a longtime fan ready to get your game on, or a new player wanting to feel the flow, this event is open for everyone to share their love for this tcg! Bring your decks (including your Genesys decks!), binders, and Kuribohs to trade, play, and climb to the top to become the king of games!! (Pls keep cursed millennium items and ancient evil spirits at the door please!)

items.title: PupCup Boba Yearbook Style Photo Shoot
items.description:
Free yearbook-style photos provided by the creators of Pittsburgh’s first (work-in-progress) furry boba/bakery shop.

Just two best friends trying to build their dream in the culinary industry, and need the input of the community.

We want to set up a free photoshoot for anyone and everyone interested in a yearbook-style photo.

In return, we ask that anyone who is interested in participating in a survey to help us find our demographic and see what the community wants.

Everyone is invited and welcomed, from friends to family, solo to groups, etc. 
Props are allowed in the photos (as long as they follow the rules and guides of the convention)
Come and join, and thank you for being a part of this experience with us.
Can't wait to see you there!

NOTE: This event is not directly affiliated with Anthrocon, but rather a submitted event like most panels.

items.title: Show Your Colors! Queer Birds & More
items.description: Have you ever wondered why birds are so colorful, or why they do funny dances? Or, most importantly, the love life of birds? If so, this panel is for you! Join Jay Margolis, a PhD candidate in evolutionary biology, for a short educational lecture on bird color and behavior, followed by a Q&A on everything you could possibly want to know about birds and queer animal behavior!

items.title: Puppet Ninja Warrior
items.description: Are you ready for an extreme obstacle course full of jumps, drops, climbing, and creative solutions? For PUPPETS? Join us for a team-based puppetry activity where you and 2-3 pals pilot a puppet through a precarious miniature obstacle course! You’ll learn how to work as a team to get your puppet through the pitfalls and emerge triumphant! Bring a few pals or get ready to team up with new friends!

items.title: Werewolf
items.description: Werewolf is a social deduction game where the town tries to run out the werewolves living among them. Some townsfolk will have special powers while others just try to live their lives. Through cleaver reasoning and trust in the correct person you can weed out the werewolves or the werewolf pack could sleep with full bellies.

items.title: Fursuit Handling and Solo Suiting
items.description:
Information on how to be a handler for fursuiter(s) while still enjoying your own con experience, or what to expect whilst suiting with/out a handler, and managing yourself at the con. (Will include real-experienced examples/scenarios, supplies, and visual representation(s) of how it works from both sides, as a handler and a suiter.)

I mainly intend for this to cover things listed above, but for a slightly more detailed breakdown for those trying to decide if this is the panel for them to attend or listen in on, I'll list a small ToC of everything I intend to cover and the order I'll cover them in....

- Introduction & describing experience (brief)
- Fursuit vision and body types, mobility, fragility, cleanliness, different types of styles and fur that can handle different types of strain or touch.
- Tips on what to carry on-hand while handling, what to look out for, how to respond to others, how to communicate and set up coordinated plans with suiter(s).
- Audience questions <--If no questions backup topics will be to go into further detail on some topics above as well as having some present suiters add their experiences.

items.title: Sea Critter Meetup
items.description: This is a meetup for sea creatures of all shapes and sizes!

items.title: Art Doll Enthusiasts
items.description: Art dolls are a new segment of the fandom. Join an enthusiastic group of creators, collectors and the curious to share recent acquisitions, creations and learn about what people are making and doing. Feel free to bring along your own work, or any new friend you have collected!  All are welcome.

items.title: Fuzzy Tales Presents: Camera, Action, Darkness
items.description: Welcome to Appalachia in the 1990s as you and your friends come to chase down a local legend to put on film for the World to see that exists in the wilderness nearby. Despite the rumors of previous people vanishing in their pursuit, that was not going to stop you from an Oscar winning film. Will you find the Creature and create your winner or vanish like the others before you.

items.title: Exploring Identity Through Furry
items.description: Identities are a huge part of how we relate to ourselves and others, as well as a form of self-expression. The furry community has always been a place where people can explore different aspects of their identity, whether that’s gender, sexuality, or other facets of self. In this panel, we’ll talk about how people explore their identities and parts through their fursona(s) and the community, and take a deeper look at the concept of identity as a whole in connecting to people, understanding ourselves, and meeting our needs.

items.title: Deep in the Shadows - Horror & Creepy Writing
items.description: Writing about creepy things can be a fun way to get our thills from the safe distance of a page. So how do we creep readers out or even give them a good scare? Join us as we go in search of that elusive cryptid-the scary/creepy story!

items.title: CANCELLED SHIBARKI: How to SPLICE your ROPE ENDS!
items.description:
Want to buy rope for reasons? If you are doing it on a budget, then this is the panel FOR YOU! 
Cutting and splicing your own rope gives you lots of hanks for cheap!
Rope splicing is the technique of interweaving a rope's strands to create secure ends to your rope cuts so they will never unravel.

- We will provide the tools and rope for you to practice splicing on. 
- The rope we provide is yours to keep!

THIS IS A SAFE FOR WORK PANEL. 
We are only splicing rope ends. No rope jamming or NSFW behavior at all please!

items.description:
Paws of Fury returns for 2026 with 7 charity gaming events! Event #7 is the biggest of them all, Super Smash Bros. Ultimate!

items.title: Pokémon Meet and Greet
items.description: Do you wanna catch ‘em all? Maybe battle, trade, or just Pokémon Snap some cute photos of your favorite Pokémon? Then this panel is for you! We’re looking to give a fun, safe, and all inclusive space for those who enjoy this wonderful hobby that has brought generations together for 30 years!! This is meant to be a space for you to converse and hang with your fellow Pokémon Fanatics! There will be a Fursuit Photo closer to the end of the panel!

items.title: Ohio Furs Meet & Greet & Group Photo
items.description:
The Annual Ohio Furs Meet & Greet & Group Photo returns to Anthrocon. Whether you are new to the Ohio area, or you are a longtime resident, this is a great way to meet new people or see some old friends. At the Meet & Greet, you'll have a chance to meet event organizers or other prominent people within our community. We'll describe how each of these individuals' roles and how they contribute to the Ohio Furs community that keeps it going strong. You will also learn how you can find information on various furry chats and fur events throughout Ohio. There will also be a chance to meet local furs from your area.

Following the Meet & Greet, we will head outside to do a group photo.

items.title: DIY Leathercraft: Leather Cat Ears
items.description: Unleash your inner kitty meow meow! In this panel, we’ll teach the basics of leatherworking, and guide you through making a pair of leather cat ears you can wear home. There will be a 25 USD materials fee, but any are welcome to watch.

items.title: Asexual Furs in Sexual Spaces: 18+ Meet and Greet
items.description:
"Come share your experiences of being Asexual in one of the most sexual fandoms! Whether you're into art, murrsuiting, or underwear parties, we want to hear about how you enjoy sexuality as an ace-spectrum person.

This panel is hosted and geared towards grey-aces, but everyone is welcome to join, whether you're allo, ace, or still figuring it out."

items.description: Welcome to Appalachia in the 1990s as you and your friends come to chase down a local legend to put on film for the World to see that exists in the wilderness nearby. items.title: The Wrath of Con: The Story of First Fandom
items.description: Join Con History for the story of First Fandom, the group of teenagers who started the concept of modern fandom and the convention scene. Learn how the roots they planted still have an influence in the con scene today, from fandom politics to filk music, from hotel model cons to early cosplay and yes even proto-fursuits. How Trekkies, Bronies, otaku, and yes even furries came from First Fandom and continue these traditions today. Presented with original artwork from our new Ursa Major Award nominated comic series The Wrath of Con, which tells the historical story of First Fandom using anthropomorphic characters.

items.title: Xenobiology: A Hypothetical
items.description: Join in for an exploration into what life beyond Earth may look like and what evidence we have for the make-up of alien physiology!

items.description: Every year, there are more and more options to get your work out there in a small press or other professional publication. This panel will specifically speak to how to submit your work to others for publication. You'll hear about the ins and outs of working with editors and publishers, as well has have a chance to ask process questions from representatives of the major furry publishers.

Do giant robot animals sound cool to you? Come chill with us! Meet up with other Zoids fans to discuss the past, present, and future of our beloved animal mechas.

Rabbi Elli, "The Furry Rebbe" has been a Chassidic Rabbi for close to 50 years. He is also known as "The Actors Rabbi" an accomplished actor/singer/voice over artist and Cantor.

items.description: What was that? Was it a ghost? A werewolf? An interdemensional being? Oh it was your friend. Or are they anymore? Maybe they are the monster. Or maybe they control it. I mean..a totally relaxing place where the rooms certainly maintain order and you won't have to defend yourself from anything at all. That sound definitely wasn't the door locking you all in.

items.title: Fursuiting 301: Healthy Fursuiting
items.description:
You fursuited today for eight hours already! The last time you ate a meal was at 10am.  Water?  Never heard of her! Dinner? Nah, got a Monster and you're good. And now you're getting back into suit for the raves? What could possibly go wrong?

Next day, you're dragging.  You're on your fourth coffee and can't keep your eyes open. Everything aches. Your head hurts. Foot and leg cramps, too???  Are you getting too old for fursuiting? 30 and already past your prime!?

Nah, but fursuiting IS cardio!

Class is in session to teach you how to keep you fursuiting for longer and recover faster, regardless of your age and fitness. Sure you know your fursuiting basics, but do you know how to keep yourself going after a weekend of fursuiting? We'll be covering hydration (And how to do it), cooling (active and passive), pre and post fursuit routines (STRETCH!), emergency management (don't get heat stroke), and more in this fursuiting panel that's intended to keep you on your fluffy paws.

Whether a new or experienced fursuiter, this panel will have something for you! And if you've been at this for a while, come share your own tips!

items.title: Escape Room ($)
items.description: Furry Logic is proud to bring back Cyberpunk Escape, previously showcased at conventions in 2020-2021! Players work together to untangle the corporate conspiracies and expose Megacorp for its wrongdoings from the inside - but act swiftly since the jamming drones can only protect you for so long before you are exposed to be traced and erased! Games are 60 minutes long, and spots will be limited! Tickets are $30 per person, with a portion of all tickets supporting charity! Rooms A and B are identical. Want to just play with family or friends? Book a private room by paying for a minimum of 5 tickets in an empty slot. Got a big group? Split into two teams and play head-to-head in our identical rooms! Please check out our online booking website https://www.bookeo.com/furrylogicllc to get your tickets early, or, check out our sales table on site for more info! If you have any questions, reach out to us at furrylogicllc@gmail.com

items.title: Orchestra Rehearsal
items.description:
Rehearsal for the Anthrocon Community Orchestra.

(This is not a performance. Come join us in the atrium on Sunday at 11am to see the performance.)

items.title: Vogue Femme with Foster Ninja
items.description: Learn the foundational five elements of vogue femme and the history of the ballroom scene. We will be going over how to properly get your tens and learning about why ballroom culture is not just about dance.  This workshop is taught by Foster, one of the members of the AC 2025 Floor Wars' winning team: Kingdom Arts Crew.

items.title: Friendly Feline Furry Fiasco
items.description: This is the place for all the cool cats to come and hang out! Get to know your fellow felines, and have fun! Feel free to bring your own cat toys, or just come to hang out! Not a cat? Come and learn more about us kitties in a roundtable style discussion! All felines, big or small, are welcome to join in the fun, and non-felines are welcome to ask all the questions they like about us, especially if they bring us treats!

items.title: CANCELLED - Ghostbusters Meet
items.description:
EVENT CANCELED AT REQUEST OF HOST

Are you troubled by strange noises in the night? 


Do you experience feelings of dread in your basement or attic?

Have you or your family actually seen a spook, specter or ghost?

If the answer is yes, then don't wait another minute. Just pick up the phone and call the professionals - Ghostbusters, We’re ready to believe you!!!

The second annual meetup for Ghostbusters fans at Anthrocon - whether you’re into the cosplay, the charity work, or just a casual enjoyer of the movies, come nerd out with us!ANEL

items.title: Dealers Room & Con Store Hours
items.description:
The Dealers Room will open to Ultrasponsors and Supersponsors at 11:30am , followed by Sponsors. 

All badge levels will be able to enter at 12:00 Noon.

- Ultrasponsors and Accessibility line up at the tables in Concourse A.
- Super Sponsors line up on the lines in Concourse A.
- Sponsors line up on the lines in Concourse B.
- General Attendance line up in Hall C.

items.title: Professional Horror Stories
items.description: Ever want to know how a legal practice actually works?  Ever wondered what exactly a stock exchange floor is like?  Want to find out how incredibly strange those "professional" jobs get?  Come by and ask away as a panel of ostensible adults tell tales out of school about what happens once you're out of school!
